name: Wednesday Group Chat
description:
Your Nevermore Academy group chat

Idk what is this actually. I stumbled upon something similar on c.ai (credits to @HobblePrince) and i thought about remaking here. Since j.ai is optimized for roleplaying and not casual chatting i don't know to what extent this can work, but i tried to put a system note to reduce roleplaying. Maybe lowering the max tokens can help too :))

The image of the bot had to change because of the Janitor TOS rules. Sorry any inconvenience!
creator: Sebastien
